clonefamily_label_rule: Rows passing the distance filter are grouped into manually reviewed IGH clonefamilies; unassigned rows remain unclustered.
nearest_neighbor_control: Random control spots are sampled from the tissue coordinate space and compared with observed clonefamily nearest-neighbor distances.
pathology_reference: Not used for IGH clonefamily panels.

clonefamily_label_rule: Same clonefamily assignment rule with LN2-specific GC labels.
nearest_neighbor_control: Random control spots are sampled per clonefamily to match observed counts.
